item.trainmurdermystery.bat.desc: Vanilla attack logic, left click to hit.
item.trainmurdermystery.defense_vial.des:
Desperado can drink directly by right-clicking to gain a shield.
Normal players can right-click a tray to pour the defense vial onto it.
The next player who takes the defense vial and eats/drinks the item will gain a shield.
Shields obtained this way max out at 1 layer.
item.noellesroles.bucket_of_h2so4.desc:
Cleaner item.
Right-click a corpse to remove it.
item.noellesroles.camera_shears.desc: Has 3 durability, 30s cooldown. Right-click a camera to disable it for 90 seconds.
item.noellesroles.cooked_food.desc: Cooked by the Chef. Comes with various effects after cooking.
item.noellesroles.letter.desc: When task point instinct is enabled, holding a letter reveals item vending machines.
item.noellesroles.master_key.desc: Can open any door. Blocked by Engineer's locks, but failing a lockpick attempt will not consume the Master Key. Drops upon death.
item.noellesroles.master_key_p.desc: Can open standard wooden doors. Has limited uses. Blocked by Engineer's locks.
item.noellesroles.noell_artisan_key.desc: Key crafted by Locksmith. Ignores items placed on doors and lockpick locks to open doors directly. Does not break reinforced items on doors. Does not drop on death.
item.noellesroles.noell_key_blank.desc: Locksmith key crafting item. Right-click to start the key forging minigame. Consumes 1 key blank on success or failure.
item.noellesroles.noell_paperclip.desc: Single-use door opening item. Can directly open doors that are not locked by a lockpick.
item.trainmurdermystery.iron_door_key.de: Can open iron doors. Has limited uses.
item.trainmurdermystery.key.desc:
Key, used to open your own room.
When task point instinct is enabled, holding the key reveals your own room door.
item.starrailexpress.knife.desc: Melee weapon, left click to knock back, right click to raise the knife and after a while strike down to stab the player to death.
item.starrailexpress.bat.desc: Melee weapon, left click to attack, has attack cooldown, spamming clicks won't deal damage.
item.starrailexpress.crowbar.desc: Right-click to permanently break open a door, can be repaired by Locksmith with a screwdriver.
item.starrailexpress.grenade.desc: Throwing weapon, right-click to throw, kills players within a certain radius of the landing point. Hold right-click to charge for a longer throw. Grenades are blocked by player entities.
item.starrailexpress.firecracker.desc: Right-click to place on the ground, emits a gunshot sound after 15s.
item.starrailexpress.revolver.desc: Basic ranged weapon, right-click to shoot.
item.starrailexpress.derringer.desc: Only 2s cooldown, replenishes ammo only when hitting a player/getting a kill. This gun has no accidental kill penalty.
item.starrailexpress.sniper_rifle.desc: Extremely long range, slower fire rate, requires Magnum Bullets to reload, can be fitted with a scope. Crouch and right-click to zoom. Ignores shields and kills players hit from 50+ blocks away.
item.starrailexpress.magnum_bullet.desc: Large caliber bullet, used to load the Sniper Rifle.
item.starrailexpress.scope.desc: Scope, can be attached to the Sniper Rifle.
item.starrailexpress.body_bag.desc: Single-use item, removes a corpse on the ground.
item.starrailexpress.blackout.desc: When purchased, turns off all lights in the map.
item.starrailexpress.psycho_mode.desc: When purchased, the Killer enters Psycho Mode, attacking with a bat, gains 1 layer of shield (except for Jester).
item.starrailexpress.poison_vial.desc: Can be right-clicked on a food or drink tray to poison the next player who takes and consumes food/drink.
item.starrailexpress.scorpion.desc: Can be right-clicked on a bed. Scorpion venom spreads to beds within a certain range, poisoning players who sleep in them.
item.starrailexpress.note.desc: Note paper, used to record information. Crouch and right-click to write text, right-click to stick on walls.
item.noellesroles.giant_note.desc: Creates a note 5 times the normal size, can be stuck onto others by the Reporter.
item.starrailexpress.binding_tool.desc: Binding tool, used to bind monitors.
item.starrailexpress.nunchuck.desc: Nunchuck, exclusive weapon for Martial Arts Instructor. See the Martial Arts Instructor role for usage instructions.
item.starrailexpress.lockpick.desc: Right-click to open any door, shift + right-click to lock the door.
item.noellesroles.foodstuff.desc: Ingredients, exclusive item for the Chef role.
item.noellesroles.pan.desc: Frying pan, used for cooking food, exclusive item for the Chef role.
item.noellesroles.once_revolver.desc: Revolver that can only be fired once.
item.noellesroles.handcuffs.desc: Handcuffs, right-click to handcuff a player. Handcuffed players can break free by continuously sneaking.
item.noellesroles.patroller_revolver.des: Special pistol for the Patroller, has a very short firing cooldown.
item.noellesroles.night_vision_glasses.d: Night Vision Goggles, provide night vision when worn.
item.noellesroles.diving_helmet.desc: Diving Helmet, provides water breathing and dolphin's grace when worn.
item.noellesroles.diving_boots.desc: Diving Boots, provide Depth Strider 3 when worn.
item.noellesroles.fake_knife.desc: Fake knife, looks like a real knife, can be raised, but cannot kill.
item.noellesroles.sp_knife.desc: Exclusive dagger for the Veteran role.
item.noellesroles.yinyang_sword.desc: Black-White's weapon. Left click: Black-White particle dash 6 blocks to kill. Right click: 1 second wind-up, releases 4-block AOE kill.
item.noellesroles.fake_revolver.desc: Fake gun, looks like a real revolver, can only be fired five times and cannot kill.
item.noellesroles.fake_bat.desc: Fake bat, looks like a real bat but cannot deal damage.
item.noellesroles.fake_psycho_mode.desc: Fake Psycho Mode, used to deceive others, exclusive item for Magician.
item.noellesroles.fake_grenade.desc: Fake grenade, looks like a real grenade, can be primed but cannot be thrown.
item.noellesroles.fake_lockpick.desc: Fake lockpick, looks real but cannot be used.
item.noellesroles.fake_crowbar.desc: Fake crowbar, looks real but cannot be used.
item.noellesroles.fake_body_bag.desc: Fake body bag, looks real but cannot hold bodies.
item.noellesroles.delusion_vial.desc: Commonly known as: Fake Poison, can be purchased from the Jester's shop. Makes the player think they are poisoned, but it's non-lethal.
item.noellesroles.defibrillator.desc: Defibrillator, exclusive item for the Doctor. Hold right-click on a player. If the player dies within 120 seconds, they will revive after 30 seconds.
item.noellesroles.boxing_glove.desc: Boxing Glove, exclusive item for Boxer. Hold right-click to raise the glove, right-click to knock back, stun, and put all items the target is holding on cooldown.
item.noellesroles.antidote_reagent.desc: Hold right-click on a player to check if they are poisoned. Has limited uses.
item.noellesroles.conspiracy_page.desc: Exclusive item for Conspirator. Right-click to open a page to guess a role. The guessed player will die.
item.noellesroles.blank_cartridge.desc: Exclusive item for Slippery Ghost. Right-click on a player to put their held revolver on cooldown.
item.noellesroles.smoke_grenade.desc: Exclusive item for Slippery Ghost. Creates a large smoke screen when thrown. 30-second cooldown.
item.noellesroles.chlorine_bomb.desc: Exclusive item for Poisoner. When thrown, poisons players within a certain radius of the landing point.
item.noellesroles.purify_bomb.desc: Exclusive item for Doctor. When thrown, detoxifies players within a certain radius of the landing point.
item.noellesroles.flash_grenade.desc: Flash Grenade. When thrown, blinds players looking at it.
item.noellesroles.decoy_grenade.desc: Decoy Grenade. When thrown, continuously emits gunshot sounds.
item.noellesroles.reinforcement.desc: Repair tool. Right-click on a door to reinforce it, allowing it to withstand one crowbar strike. Crouch and right-click to remove items placed on the door.
item.noellesroles.screwdriver.desc: Screwdriver. Crouch and right-click to remove items placed on a door. The Locksmith can also use the screwdriver to restore a door's state (repair a door broken open by a crowbar).
item.noellesroles.alarm_trap.desc: Alarm Trap. When triggered by a crowbar, sounds an alarm. Doors with an alarm trap placed on them become locked.
item.noellesroles.delivery_box.desc: Right-click on a player to use. Allows the deliverer and the target to exchange items.
item.noellesroles.hallucination_bottle.d: 2 durability. Right-click to use, forces players within a certain range to have their camera view twisted 3 times.
item.noellesroles.written_note.desc: Exclusive item for Recorder. Right-click to record a player's identity.
item.noellesroles.bomb.desc: Exclusive item for Bomber. Right-click on a player to pass the bomb. The bomb explodes after a certain time, killing the holder.
item.noellesroles.wheelchair.desc: Exclusive item for Old Man. Right-click to place a wheelchair on the ground.
item.noellesroles.lock.desc: Lock, used to lock doors. When a Killer uses a lockpick on a locked door, they must manually perform a lockpicking minigame.
item.noellesroles.pocket_watch.desc: Pocket watch. Right-click to check the in-game time. 60-second cooldown.
item.noellesroles.adrenaline.desc: Single-use item, exclusive to Alchemist. Right-click on a player to increase their stamina cap by 2 points.
item.noellesroles.antibiotic.desc: Single-use item, exclusive to Alchemist. Right-click on a player to detoxify them.
item.noellesroles.hedinghong.desc: Single-use item, exclusive to Alchemist. Right-click on a player to poison them.
item.noellesroles.toilet_poison.desc: Single-use item, exclusive to Poisoner. Right-click on a toilet to poison the next player who uses it.
item.noellesroles.dogskin_plaster.desc: Single-use item, exclusive to Alchemist. Right-click on a player to prevent their SAN from decreasing for 30 seconds.
Single-use item. Right-click on a player to apply one of the following 6 buffs randomly: Reduced SAN drain, SAN drain immunity, SAN regeneration, Infinite stamina, Stamina boost, Stamina recovery boost. Alerts the target to the effect gained.
item.noellesroles.fire_axe.desc: Exclusive item for Firefighter. Has 3 durability. Hold right-click to raise the fire axe and kill a target. Killing consumes all 3 durability. Crouch and right-click on a door to break it open, consuming 1 durability. Cannot kill with the fire axe unless it is at full durability.
item.noellesroles.throwing_knife.desc: Press Q to throw. Right-click to raise the knife and perform a kill.
item.noellesroles.rope.desc: Exclusive item for Rescuer. Right-click to pull the closest player in a straight line in front of you towards you.
item.noellesroles.extinguisher.desc: Exclusive item for Firefighter. Has 5 durability. Right-click or hold right-click to spray a player. Sprayed players receive Slowness and Blindness. Can remove gasoline poured by Arsonist.
item.noellesroles.passbook.desc: Exclusive item for Accountant. Right-click to deposit money (max 300 gold). The passbook is passed to a nearby good player when the Accountant dies. The passbook can be dropped.
item.noellesroles.alchemy_material.desc: Exclusive item for Alchemist, used to craft potions.
item.noellesroles.signature_paper.desc: Exclusive item for Star. Right-click to sign. Crouch and right-click to sign a Life-and-Death Pledge. See Star role description for details.
item.noellesroles.life_and_death_shape.d: Life-and-Death Pledge. Allows the Star to block one instance of damage for you.
item.noellesroles.signed_paper.desc: Signed paper. Players holding signed paper can see the Star's location constantly and gain Speed 1 when looking at the Star.
item.noellesroles.bowen_badge.desc: Bowen Badge, exclusive item for Jotaro. Hold right-click for 3s to dash, killing the target collided with and knocking back surrounding targets.
item.noellesroles.shisiye.desc: Exclusive item for Maid Sakuya. Grants Speed 10 when consumed.
item.noellesroles.problem_set.desc: Problem set. Right-click to start solving problems. Correct answers grant rewards, failures grant penalties.
item.noellesroles.antidote.desc: Right-click on a player to detoxify them. Has a cooldown, which is shorter when an Infected is present.
item.noellesroles.pill.desc: Edible pill. Purchased from Doctor's shop as detox pill, from Poisoner's shop as poison pill.
item.noellesroles.toxin.desc: Single-use item, ranged weapon. Right-click to poison the targeted player.
item.noellesroles.catalyst.desc: Exclusive item for Poisoner. Right-click to kill all poisoned players instantly.
item.noellesroles.bandit_revolver.desc: Pistol used by Bandit and Executioner. Shorter range.
item.noellesroles.stalker_knife.desc: Exclusive weapon for Stalker Phase 2. Hold right-click to charge a stab that kills the target, increasing Phase 2 progress on kill. Crouch and right-click to charge faster. 10-second attack cooldown.
Exclusive off-hand weapon for Stalker Phase 2. Hold right-click to charge a stab that kills the target, increasing Phase 2 progress on kill. Crouch and right-click to charge faster. 10-second attack cooldown.
item.stupid_express.jerry_can.desc: Exclusive item for Arsonist. Right-click to douse a player with gasoline.
item.stupid_express.lighter.desc: Exclusive item for Arsonist. Right-click to ignite doused players. See Arsonist role description for details.
item.starrailexpress.camera.desc: Surveillance camera, functions like real-life CCTV.
item.starrailexpress.dark_toilet.desc: Dark toilet, task block. Right-click to sit on the toilet and complete the toilet task.
item.starrailexpress.light_toilet.desc: Light toilet, task block. Right-click to sit on the toilet and complete the toilet task.
item.starrailexpress.security_monitor.de: Security monitor, used to view camera feeds.
item.noellesroles.monitoring_terminal.de: Remote monitoring terminal. First right-click a security monitor to bind, then right-click anywhere to remotely view the bound monitor.
item.noellesroles.ninja_knife.desc: Single-use item, melee weapon for Ninja. Right-click to assassinate a target instantly. Silent.
item.noellesroles.ninja_shuriken.desc: Single-use item, ranged weapon for Ninja. Hold right-click to throw. Silent.
item.noellesroles.mercenary_contract.des: Exclusive item for Mercenary. Others can right-click to sign an雇佣 contract, choose a target, and pay 175 gold. The Mercenary right-clicks a signed contract to receive payment and track the target. Contracts can be dropped by pressing Q.
item.noellesroles.riot_shield.desc: Exclusive item for Guard. When equipped in main/off-hand and blocking, can block one frontal attack and provide protection.
item.noellesroles.baton.desc: Exclusive item for Guard. Melee weapon with 4 durability. Left-click to attack, stunning the target. If the target is hit twice by the baton within 4 seconds, the second hit kills.
item.noellesroles.radio.desc: Right-click to use, allows voice communication with other players remotely.
item.noellesroles.short_shotgun.desc: Single-use item. Kills all players within a 2-block cone.
item.noellesroles.executioner_gun.desc: Exclusive weapon for The Fool. Only damages players with the 'Heretic' effect (one-shot kill). Starts with 1 bullet, can only be reloaded via Tarot Club meetings.
item.noellesroles.honored_note.desc: Purchased from The Fool's shop. Right-click on a wall/floor to stick, creating an indestructible text entity. Players can press J to pray near the note to become a 'Tarot Club Member'.
item.noellesroles.spirit_cloak.desc: Purchased from The Fool's shop. Right-click to use, granting 5 seconds of invincibility, inability to attack, but normal movement speed. 90-second cooldown.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_cleaning_byprod: Byproduct from cleaning tasks. Can be exchanged for 1 Emerald at DNF exchange task points.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_task_tool.desc: Look at a DNF task point and hold right-click for 8 seconds to complete the task.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_cleaning_task_p: DNF cleaning task point. Use the task tool and hold right-click to clean.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_exchange_task_p: DNF exchange task point. Exchange 1 cleaning byproduct for 1 Emerald.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_toxic_heart.des: Special material obtained by Poisoner after poisoning a kill. Five are needed for the Redemption formula.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_redemption_poti: Redemption potion. Crafting two triggers an independent ending for the Chef and Poisoner.
Old diary found by the Chef at a config point, containing clues about the Old Chef, Poisoner, and Redemption Potion.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_redemption_form: Formula obtained after the Poisoner and Chef meet. Right-click to consume materials and craft two Redemption potions.
item.starrailexpress.drawing_board.desc:
You can obtain items by drawing the item's texture on the drawing board.
Right-click to open, draw in the drawing area. Upon confirmation, the system will recognize the drawing. Upon successful recognition, you will receive the depicted item and consume 1 drawing board.
If the item's texture contains white, please use white in the palette to color it. The system will not recognize background white.
If recognition fails, try modifying individual pixels. Image recognition is not necessarily 100%% standard (random scribbles might randomly yield other things).
 
You cannot obtain the following items via the drawing board:
- Drawing Board / Grenade / Lockpick / Bat / Derringer / Scorpion / Sheriff faction special weapons (except Baton)
- Only the Revolver will be recognized for pistols, only the normal Knife for knives.
- Chlorine Bomb / Purify Bomb / Poison Vial / Pill / Hallucination Bottle / Frying Pan / Bucket of H2SO4 / Blank Cartridge / Key Blank
- Neutral faction exclusive items / Fake items / Vanilla Minecraft items
- Alchemist / Star / The Fool / Time Delayer / Photographer exclusive items
- Any other keys except the Attendant's Key / Crowbar / Paperclip
item.noellesroles.zero_one_five_gun.desc: Exclusive pistol. Right-click to shoot. First hit applies Slowness II for 3 seconds, second shot auto-fires after 1.2 seconds. Second hit kills instantly. 15-second cooldown after both shots. Range 30 blocks.
